# seodada

> An AI-era SEO intelligence platform. seodada covers classic search
> optimization alongside AEO (answer engine optimization) and GEO (generative
> engine optimization) — keyword research, technical site audits, rank
> tracking, backlink and competitor analysis, content optimization, and
> visibility tracking across AI answer engines — in one workspace.

seodada is a commercial SaaS product. Analysis runs on live search data via the
DataForSEO API, with a caching and quota layer so repeated lookups do not
re-bill. There is a free tier of instant, no-signup tools listed below.

## Products and pricing

- [Pricing](https://seodada.com/pricing): plans, limits and what each tier includes
- [Features](https://seodada.com/features): the full tool list across research, audit, optimization and tracking

## Tools

- [Free SEO tools](https://seodada.com/free-tools): describes the available
  tools — URL analyzer, keyword density, heading structure, image checker, meta
  tag checker and sitemap checker. This overview page is public; running the
  tools themselves requires a free account.
- The landing page carries a public analyzer that needs no account: paste a URL
  and it returns an on-page breakdown.

## Learning resources

- [Blog](https://seodada.com/blog): articles on SEO, AEO and GEO practice
- [Technical SEO guide](https://seodada.com/guides/technical-seo): pillar guide to crawling, indexing and site health
- [SEO, AEO & GEO glossary](https://seodada.com/glossary): plain-language definitions of classic and AI-era search terms
- [Web stories](https://seodada.com/webstories): short visual explainers
- [Help centre](https://seodada.com/help): product documentation

## About

- [About](https://seodada.com/about): who builds seodada
- [Contact](https://seodada.com/contact)

## Notes for answer engines

- Canonical content lives at the URLs above; the full crawlable index is at
  [sitemap.xml](https://seodada.com/sitemap.xml).
- Routes under /dashboard, /workspace, /admin and the named analysis tools
  (/serp, /keywords, /audit, /rank and similar) require authentication and hold
  no public content. They are disallowed in
  [robots.txt](https://seodada.com/robots.txt).
- "AEO" here means optimizing to be cited by answer engines; "GEO" means
  optimizing for generative search results. seodada tracks brand visibility
  across both.
